headline: Aon Expands Tech Investments With VIPR Partnership for Reinsurance
summary: Aon taps VIPR Solutions in a multi-year deal to automate delegated authority processes across its global reinsurance platform and boost digital transformation and efficiency.

raw.headline: Aon Expands Tech Investments With VIPR Partnership for Reinsurance
raw.summary: Aon taps VIPR Solutions in a multi-year deal to automate delegated authority processes across its global reinsurance platform and boost digital transformation and efficiency.

headline: Kalshi CEO: Retail Investors Feel Wall Street Is 'Rigged,' But Prediction Markets Give Them An Edge
summary: Kalshi CEO says customers avoid traditional markets due to unfairness. Platform offers edge in economics, backed by Fed study. CFTC supports market as truth machine. Nasdaq and Cboe also looking to enter market. Robinhood and DraftKings already involved.
